text: Area Forecast Discussion, NWS Newport/Morehead City NC. Hurricane Florence is expected to make landfall along the southeastern North Carolina coast as a Category 1 hurricane. Life-threatening storm surge and catastrophic inland flooding are the primary threats. Tropical storm conditions will spread into Carteret County tonight.

Coastal Waters Forecast, NWS Newport/Morehead City NC. Hurricane Dorian will pass near the Outer Banks and make landfall near Cape Hatteras as a Category 1 hurricane. Seas building to 15 to 20 feet near the Gulf Stream. Mariners should remain in port.

Area Forecast Discussion, NWS Newport/Morehead City NC. Hurricane Irene will move north across eastern North Carolina, with landfall expected near Cape Lookout as a Category 1 hurricane. Damaging winds and significant storm surge are anticipated across the Pamlico Sound.
